rulings.Case Title: KREMEN VS DORBANK
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OF DEFENDANT OFFNER SUSTAINED as FOLLOWS: 3rd cause of action malicious prosecution re bankruptcy sustained without leave to amend, preempted by federal law; 4th civil contempt, 5th aiding and abetting fraudulent concealment, 7th intentional misrepresentation, 8th negligent misrepresentation, 9th concealment sustained without leave to amend - no state claim arises for violation of federal preliminary injunction - remedy lies in federal court only. Demurrer sustained to 11th and 12th causes of action RICO without leave to amend. Sustained without leave to 13th cause of action barred by litigation privilege and no underlying violation for 17200. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: KREMEN VS DORBANK
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OF DEFENDANTS DORBAND, DUBOFF, CUSHING, KING and DUBOFF LAW GROUP SUSTAINED as FOLLOWS: To the 1st cause of action malicious prosecution WITH leave to amend pending the outcome of the appeal. To the 5th cause of action aiding & abetting fraudulent concealment without leave to amend, as the acts complained of are privileged, and no duty was owed to Kremen; To the 11th and 12th RICO causes of action without leave to amend, as the acts complained of are privileged, and the causes are not pled with the requisite specificity; and TO the 13th COA without leave to amend, as the acts complained of are privileged, and because there is no other violation on which to predicate the claim. The defendants did not challenge the 2nd COA for malicious prosecution, which remains. (JH)
